title: Episode III Post Notes
content:
{{Top|rwm}}
'''Episode III Post Notes''' was a feature on the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] fan club website. It contained thirty reports written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] during the post-production of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. Post Notes goes behind the scenes to reveal much of [[Industrial Light & Magic]]'s work on Episode III.
